summary: Tested new features: sidebar navigation restructuring, cash import from Google Sheets. All 13 backend tests passed, all frontend UI elements working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly after data loads

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/cash-import/fetch requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: POST /api/cash-import/fetch requires sheet_url parameter (400)
Backend: POST /api/cash-import/fetch requires date_from and date_to (400)
Backend: POST /api/cash-import/fetch rejects invalid Google Sheets URL (400)
Backend: POST /api/cash-import/fetch successfully parses public Google Sheet (200)
Backend: POST /api/cash-import/confirm requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: POST /api/cash-import/confirm requires non-empty transactions (400)
Backend: POST /api/cash-import/confirm successfully imports transactions (200)
Backend: GET /api/cash-import/settings requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: GET /api/cash-import/settings returns sheets array (200)
Backend: PUT /api/cash-import/settings requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: PUT /api/cash-import/settings saves sheet URLs (200)
Backend: Deduplication marks previously imported transactions as duplicates
Frontend: Sidebar 'Документы' section is collapsible [data-testid='nav-documents-toggle']
Frontend: Documents section has 'Все документы' [data-testid='nav-documents']
Frontend: Documents section has 'Импорт выписок' [data-testid='nav-import']
Frontend: Documents section has 'Автоправила' [data-testid='nav-settings-rules']
Frontend: Sidebar 'Планирование' section is collapsible [data-testid='nav-planning-toggle']
Frontend: Planning section has 'Платёжный календарь' [data-testid='nav-planning-calendar']
Frontend: Planning section has 'План расходов' [data-testid='nav-planning-expenses']
Frontend: Planning section does NOT have Import or Auto-rules (moved to Documents)
Frontend: Import page has 'Импорт PDF выписки' button [data-testid='open-pdf-import-btn']
Frontend: Import page has 'Импорт наличных' button [data-testid='open-cash-import-btn']
Frontend: Cash Import Modal opens [data-testid='cash-import-modal']
Frontend: Cash Import Modal has URL input [data-testid='sheet-url-input']
Frontend: Cash Import Modal has date from input [data-testid='cash-date-from']
Frontend: Cash Import Modal has date to input [data-testid='cash-date-to']
Frontend: Cash Import Modal has fetch button [data-testid='fetch-cash-btn']
Frontend: Cash Import Modal fetches data from Google Sheets (49 transactions)
Frontend: Cash Import Modal review step has select all checkbox [data-testid='cash-select-all']
Frontend: Cash Import Modal review step has back button [data-testid='cash-back-btn']
Frontend: Cash Import Modal review step has confirm button [data-testid='cash-confirm-btn']
Frontend: Cash Import Modal review step shows 49 transaction rows with inline direction selectors
Frontend: Cash Import Modal review step shows comment field per row
Frontend: Cash Import Modal review step shows review toggle (?) per row
Frontend: Cash Import Modal shows stats: total, selected, duplicates, sum
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx: Sidebar navigation correctly restructured with Documents section containing Import and Auto-rules
Layout.jsx: Planning section only has calendar and expenses as expected
CashImportModal.jsx: Full implementation with config and review steps, inline direction selector per row
cash_import.py: Backend correctly fetches public Google Sheets, parses CSV, and handles deduplication
BankImportModal.jsx: Auto-saves PDF to documents on import confirmation (verified in code)
seed_data_creation: Imported 3 test transactions via cash import API for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Sidebar nav restructured - Documents section has Import and Auto-rules, Planning only has calendar and expenses. 2) Cash Import from Google Sheets fully functional - fetches public sheet, shows review table with inline direction selector, comment field, and review toggle per row. 3) PDF auto-save to documents on bank import confirmation (verified in BankImportModal.jsx code). Test Google Sheet URL: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1S5OcIk2oPr8F0mrUX0U4ioDGSm6L-NNW08vttUkgH8E/edit with period 2026-03-01 to 2026-03-31 returns 49 expense transactions.

review_step.review_toggle: Button with AlertTriangle icon per row

pdf_auto_save_to_documents.description: After import confirmation, PDF file is auto-saved to documents via POST /api/documents/upload
